slides.title: World Cup match nights
slides.text: Turn big fixtures into a full pub night with cold pints, screens, friends, chants and a table ready before kick-off.
slides.detail: Big screens, big fixtures, big atmosphere
bullets: Group tables for fans and afterworks

slides.title: Molly Malone's
slides.text: A modern Irish pub experience on the Chartrons quays: terrace pints, pub classics, live music, match nights and group reservations until late.

slides.title: Live acoustic nights
slides.text: Stage, microphone and sound setup make Molly's a natural stop for live music, singalongs and late-night Bordeaux plans.
slides.detail: Stage, mic, piano and sound system
bullets: Warm pub room with close-up atmosphere
Dinner, drinks and music in one place

slides.title: Birthdays, afterworks & student nights
slides.text: Bring the crew for terrace drinks, sharing boards, match nights or a festive table in the heart of Chartrons.
bullets: Terrace, dining room and event corner

spaces.title: Quay-side terrace, warm dining room and space for a proper night out.
spaces.text: Built for everything from one pint after the Sunday market to a full birthday table, with indoor seating, terrace space and a group-friendly layout.

items.title: Front terrace
items.text: Sunny tables facing the quays, made for market-day pints, casual lunches and long Bordeaux evenings.

items.title: Pub dining room
items.text: A warm Irish pub room for burgers, fish and chips, steak and ale pie, afterwork rounds and late dinners.

items.title: Event corner
items.text: Stage-ready setup with piano, microphone and sound equipment for live sets, birthdays and work gatherings.

menu.title: Real pub plates, pints and whiskey without the boring menu wall.
menu.intro: Select a few food and drink ideas to shape a table request for a group, match night or live music evening.

featured.name: Galway Fish & Chips
featured.description: Beer-battered fish, fries and proper Irish pub comfort for terrace lunches and match nights.

featured.name: Big Irish Breakfast
featured.description: Sausage, bacon, eggs, baked beans, fries and tomato for the table that came hungry.

featured.name: Dublin Tapas
featured.description: Calamari, onion rings, spicy cheese bites and prawns for a group-friendly pub start.

categories.title: Irish pub mains
items: Grilled beef with sauce and fries or salad
Grilled lamb skewer with rice and tzatziki
Sausage, bacon, eggs, beans, fries and tomato

categories.title: Tapas to share
items: Calamari, onion rings, spicy cheese bites and prawns
A bowl of spicy chicken wings made for groups
Simple plates for pints, afterworks and late tables

categories.title: Sweet finish
items: Creamy cheesecake with an Irish pub signature
A softer landing after dinner or music

categories.title: Softs and easy extras
items: Coca, Perrier, Orangina, Schweppes and Pago
Choice of teas, cafe and hot chocolate

matchCard.title: Book a table before the fixture fills the room.
matchCard.text: Pair pints with Galway Fish & Chips, Dublin Tapas or wings, then stay for the final whistle.

visitMoments.title: One pub, three easy reasons to come in.
visitMoments.text: The site should push clear moments: lunch, music and groups. These are the fastest decisions for guests browsing on mobile.

items.title: Lunch on the quays
items.text: Fast pub plates for work breaks, tourists and Sunday market visits.

items.title: Dinner before music
items.text: Come early for warm plates before the room turns into a live set.

items.title: Food for groups
items.text: Sharing plates and casual dishes keep bigger tables easy to manage.

bar.title: Cold pints, whisky shelves and a room that keeps moving.
bar.text: The bar is the anchor: pints for the terrace, whisky for slower evenings, and easy rounds for match-night tables.

events.title: Live music, football nights and a crowd that knows the chorus.
events.text: Molly Malone's is set up for atmosphere: screens for major sports, a stage for concerts and enough space for big groups without losing the pub feel.

items.label: Live music
items.title: Acoustic sessions and pub concerts
items.text: Weekly live music energy with the easy, noisy charm of a proper Irish pub.

items.label: Match nights
items.title: Football, rugby and World Cup screens
items.text: Big-game atmosphere for France, Ireland, Premier League nights and tournament fixtures.

items.label: Groups
items.title: Birthdays, afterworks and student nights
items.text: Reserve tables for a small crew or bring the whole team for a relaxed Chartrons gathering.

reservation.title: Reserve for dinner, match night or a private group.
reservation.text: For the fastest confirmation, call the pub directly. For larger groups, include your preferred space, event type and timing.
reservation.name: Name

venueFeatures.title: Built for the way pub nights actually happen.
venueFeatures.text: A strong landing page should turn practical venue features into reasons to book: groups, sound, screens and easy comfort.

items.title: Group friendly
items.text: Afterworks, birthdays, student nights and casual business drinks without making the booking feel complicated.

items.title: Ready for sound
items.text: Stage, microphone and sound equipment make concerts, speeches and event moments feel natural.

items.title: Easy essentials
items.text: Wi-Fi, table service, television, terrace seating and accessible listing features for a smoother visit.

gallery.title: A look inside Molly's.
gallery.text: Public venue photography from Bordeaux listing pages, selected to show the real facade, seating, bar, terrace and event atmosphere.

visit.title: On the quays in historic Chartrons.
visit.text: Drop in before or after a walk along the Garonne, meet friends after the Sunday market, or make Molly Malone's the base for your next match night.
visit.quote: A lively Irish pub for terrace drinks, live concerts and match nights in one of Bordeaux's best walking districts.
